name: Execute Stored Procedure In Snowflake
description: This node executes Stored Procedure in Snowflake
output: Pass the return data from SP to in next node and pass the input dataframe to next node.

fields.name: authType
fields.title: Auth Type
fields.description: Authentication Type. Possible value is OAUTH or USER_CREDENTIAL or KEYPAIR

fields.name: sfWarehouse
fields.title: Snowflake Warehouse
fields.description: Warehouse for connecting to the Snowflake

fields.name: sfDatabase
fields.title: Snowflake Database
fields.description: Database for connecting to the Snowflake

fields.name: sfSchema
fields.title: Snowflake Schema
fields.description: Schema for connecting to the Snowflake

fields.name: parameterType
fields.title: SP Parameter Type
fields.description: Stored Procedure input parameter Type: string, integer, double, float, boolean and datetime.

fields.name: returnValueName
fields.title: SP Return Value Name
fields.description: Stored Procedure ouput Return Value Name.

fields.name: returnValueType
fields.title: SP Return Type
fields.description: Stored Procedure ouput Return Value Type: string, integer, double, float, boolean and datetime..
